chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-1758 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No.1958/2022 (I R.10) 2. For order as to maintainability of instant petition 21.8.2025 None present for the petitioners -------------------------------- This is an old case of 2022, which is over three years ago. It was last taken up on 18.5.2022, since then learned counsel for the petitioners has not made any serious efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. The question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
